image.prompt_text:
Create a high-fantasy character portrait for a tabletop RPG.
No text, logos, watermarks, or copyrighted characters.
Keep a clear silhouette, consistent lighting, and game-ready detail.
Portrait framing: head and shoulders, neutral background.
Character attributes:
- Name: Gribbles Rindsworth the Magnificent
- Ancestry: Goblin
- Class: Rogue
- Background: street-urchin
- Alignment: CN
- Deity: None (worships cheese conceptually)
- Age: Adult (exact age uncertain)
- Gender/Pronouns: Male
- Concept: Cheese-obsessed goblin rogue with a rat intelligence network, on a quest for the Legendary Cheese
- Appearance: Small goblin with oversized ears that perk up at the word 'cheese'. Wears a distinctive hat made from aged cheese wrappers. His studded leather armor features tiny brass buttons shaped like cheese wheels. Always carries himself with unwarranted confidence and gesticulates wildly when speaking. Bright, intelligent eyes constantly dart about, assessing threats and opportunities.
- Personality: Silly and whimsical but genuinely confident. Talks fast and gesticulates wildly. Unshakably loyal once bribed with snacks. Refers to himself in third person when excited. Has an intelligence network of rats, led by 'Eduardo'. Deep and abiding fear of spiders. Considers cheese a spiritual experience.
- Backstory: Gribbles grew up in the undercity, scavenging and developing an improbably refined palate for cheese. He built a small intelligence network of rats led by his most trusted associate, Eduardo, who tipped him off about a Legendary Cheese aged in the Fungal Pantry deep within the dungeon. Gribbles' cousin Blemish was flattened by a trap and now serves as a bookmark — he's fine with it, mostly. Gribbles is on a sacred quest to find the cheese, and he'll partner with any adventurer willing to share a pickle and tolerate his enthusiasm.
- Abilities: STR 10, DEX 18, CON 14, INT 12, WIS 12, CHA 14
User direction:
villainous goblin tavern/dungeon antagonist portrait
image.negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, low quality, deformed

The image should be a single game object viewed from above, suitable for placement on a hex grid.
Style: high-fantasy hand-painted token art with clean edges.
Requirements: transparent background (PNG), strong silhouette at 64x64 to 128x128 pixels, no text or labels.
Object: Bar Counter A
Category: bar
Description: Fixed wooden bar counter segment forming the left section of the tavern's main bar. Provides a physical barrier for drink service and can provide cover during combat.
Size: large
Dominant color: #654321
Show as a bar counter section from above: a long rectangular wooden counter surface. Polished wood grain visible.
